title: The Quack Doctor and the Reindeer — Part 6
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on the quack doctor and the reindeer — part 6, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Quack Doctor and the Reindeer — Part 6. Hiriluk reaches out to Chopper and gives him a place to belong, while Drum Kingdom’s cruelty remains in the background. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Get lost! I don't care if you leave for the seas or wherever!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Just make sure you never show your face around here ever again!
